task_completion.description: Agent executes the automated test suite for the OpenICE project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the execution of tests (e.g., using `./gradlew test` or similar Gradle commands) within the `/opt/openice/mdpnp/` directory.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the test execution report file at the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a file being created or edited at `/home/ga/Desktop/test_execution_report.txt`.

task_completion.description: The report includes the current Git commit hash and a list of tested modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of the report file explicitly shows a 7-character Git commit hash and lists the names of the modules that were tested.

task_completion.description: The report includes a statistical summary of the test results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file contains a clear breakdown of test statistics, specifically listing Total, Passed, Failed, and Skipped counts.

task_completion.description: The report includes details of failures and a concluding deployment recommendation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file lists failure details (Class/Method/Error) or explicitly states there were no failures, and concludes with a recommendation on whether the project is ready for deployment.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent actually ran the test suite rather than fabricating a report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing genuine Gradle test execution progress and results.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent gathered statistics from actual test outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen viewing the terminal output of the test run or reading the generated JUnit XML files (e.g., `TEST-*.xml`) to extract the numbers and failure details.

integrity.description: Verifies that the tests were executed in the correct project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompt or `cd` commands confirm the working directory is `/opt/openice/mdpnp/` when tests are run and the git commit is retrieved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The OpenICE project is located at `/opt/openice/mdpnp/` and uses Gradle 7.6 with Java 17. The agent should run tests using Gradle (e.g., `./gradlew test`). Test results are generated as JUnit XML files matching `TEST-*.xml` in `build/test-results/test/` directories. The Git commit hash can be obtained using `git log --oneline -1`, which outputs a 7-character hash. The final report must be saved to `/home/ga/Desktop/test_execution_report.txt` and contain the commit hash, tested modules, test statistics (Total/Passed/Failed/Skipped), failure details (Class/Method/Error), and a deployment recommendation.
